videos.headline: Penn State's Nick Singleton scores a rushing TD
videos.description: Nick Singleton scores a 2-yard rushing touchdown to put Penn State ahead 10-7 in the second quarter vs. Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penn State's Nick Singleton scores a rushing TD) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Maryland strikes early on a Kaden Prather TD grab
videos.description: MJ Morris throws a 25-yard touchdown pass to Kaden Prather after Maryland recovered a fumble from Penn State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Maryland strikes early on a Kaden Prather TD grab) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Drew Allar finds the end zone for Penn State
videos.description: Penn State QB Drew Allar finds the end zone with a 1-yard rushing touchdown to give Penn State a 17-7 lead vs. Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Drew Allar finds the end zone for Penn State) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Penn State's Tyler Warren hurdles defender on an impressive 29-yard rush
videos.description: Tyler Warren shows off his athleticism and hurdles a Maryland defender on an impressive 29-yard run for the Nittany Lions.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penn State's Tyler Warren hurdles defender on an impressive 29-yard rush) 2024/11/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Warren breaks Penn State record for most TE receiving touchdowns
videos.description: Tyler Warren breaks the record for most receiving touchdowns by a tight end in Penn State history as the Nittany Lions move up 31-7 on Maryland.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Warren breaks Penn State record for most TE receiving touchdowns) 2024/11/30 ESHEET
